title: Air Puffers
description: The mod that adds Air Puffers to your game
body:
# Air Puffers
_Adds Air Puffers to your game!_

![Air Puffer Guy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/913115fb3d8d9a0a37b2788d13e6d6420261d9d9.gif)

_Air Puffers are ambient mobs that can be found across your world, they can also be brushed to drop a wind charge!_

_Unlike most mobs, Air Puffers have a defense mechanism against danger: Whenever they feel alarmed, they will create a small wind explosion (similar to the wind charge) knocking away nearby enemies in an attempt to escape._

They can be found in the following biomes across the overworld:
- Plains
- Flower Forests
- Meadows
- Taiga
- Dark Forests
- Cherry Groves
- Stony Shores
- Jagged Peaks
- Old Growth Birch Forests

Enjoy your world with these silly companions :)
